areas.name: RBA environment
areas.summary: External collaboration environment mirroring Production with partner-specific data and deployment.
review_questions: Does this change behave the same on RBA as on Production (feature flags, INSTANCE_SOURCE, extended fields)?
If serializers or API responses changed, do RBA additional identifiers (duns_id, lei_id, rba_id) still serialize correctly?
If indexing or search changed, will Logstash/OpenSearch on the RBA instance still index production locations?
If deployment/terraform changed, is the RBA tag prefix and ECS cluster configuration still valid?

areas.name: Embed mode
areas.summary: Embedded maps and contributor embed configs with restricted UI, query params, and serializers.
review_questions: Does embed=1 still work for facility search, detail, and download flows?
Are embed-only serializers/views updated alongside the main code path?
Do UI components hide actions correctly when embed is active (navbar, claim, download)?
If field visibility or formatting changed, are embed display fields and searchable flags still consistent?

areas.name: Production Location page vs legacy Facility Details
areas.summary: Two frontend surfaces for the same data, gated by ENABLE_PRODUCTION_LOCATION_PAGE.
review_questions: If you changed facility detail behavior, did you update BOTH ProductionLocationDetails* and FacilityDetails* (or shared utils)?
Does shouldUseProductionLocationPage routing still redirect correctly from the legacy page?
Are feature-flag-off and feature-flag-on paths both covered by tests?
Do map clicks, contribute flows, and embed navigation still open the correct profile page?

areas.name: API request throttling
areas.summary: Burst/sustained/data-upload throttles and duplicate-request protection on write endpoints.
review_questions: If a view's throttle_classes changed, are burst/sustained defaults in settings still appropriate?
Does DuplicateThrottle cache key logic still distinguish different resources (pk in key)?
Could larger payloads hit DuplicateThrottle MAX_REQUEST_SIZE or duplicate false positives?
If user rate fields changed, does check_api_limits still enforce blocks correctly?

areas.name: AWS Step Functions
areas.summary: Scheduled ECS App CLI jobs (check_api_limits, update_expired_download_limits) via Step Functions.
review_questions: If management commands used by Step Functions changed signature or imports, will scheduled runs still succeed?
Do terraform changes preserve IAM permissions for Step Functions -> ECS task execution?
If timeout_seconds or schedule_expression changed, is the command runtime still within limits?
Are Django upgrades compatible with commands invoked by the state machine (see OSDEV-2704)?

areas.name: OpenSearch / Logstash indexing
areas.summary: Search indexing pipeline for facilities and production locations.
review_questions: If model fields or serializers changed, do index mappings and Logstash filters still match?
Will long query strings or new filters trigger OpenSearch errors?
Does RBA indexing need a separate verification pass?

areas.name: Dedupe Hub / list processing
areas.summary: Kafka-backed matching and deduplication for facility uploads and API creates.
review_questions: If facility create/update flow changed, will Dedupe Hub still receive and process events?
Are moderation event payloads backward compatible?
Do facility types with SKIPPED_MATCHING still behave correctly end-to-end?

areas.name: Feature flags & private instance
areas.summary: Waffle switches that gate downloads, embed, claims, and production location page.
review_questions: If behavior is flag-gated, are both enabled and disabled states handled?
Does private_instance still restrict downloads/search as expected?
If a new switch was added, is enable_switches.py or a migration included?

areas.name: Database migrations
areas.summary: Schema changes deployed to Production, Sandbox, RBA, and Pre-prod with different DB sizes.
review_questions: Is the migration backward compatible and safe on large production datasets?
Does it need a data backfill or multi-step deploy?
Will RBA and Pre-prod receive the same migration without downtime issues (OSDEV-1428)?
If the migration touches indexed tables, did the automated indexation checks pass (see migration_db_indexation)?

areas.name: Migration DB indexation triggers
areas.summary: Migrations on indexed tables must avoid per-row reindexing and full-table backfills. This area is only evaluated when a migration file is part of the pushed commits. See PR #1123 and migration 0219 for the reference fix.
review_questions: If altering an indexed table (api_contributor, api_facility, api_extendedfield, etc.), does the migration DROP the table's post_insert_update_indexing_trigger BEFORE the schema change and recreate it AFTER?
Avoid full-table backfills: use ADD COLUMN ... NOT NULL DEFAULT <value> (PostgreSQL 11+ metadata-only) instead of ADD nullable -> UPDATE ... SET -> SET NOT NULL.
When keeping a DB default, declare db_default on the Django field and in state_operations so makemigrations --check stays clean.
Only disable/recreate triggers for the tables you are migrating - do not blanket-disable indexing across unrelated tables.
After the migration, verify manage.py migrate and makemigrations --check pass; confirm no accidental facility/contributor reindex was triggered.
